leadText: Recover (Japanese: じこさいせい Self-regeneration) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation I.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generations I to III 1.2 Generation IV 1.3 Generation V to VII 1.4 Generation VIII 1.4.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.5 Generation IX 1.5.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations I to III [ edit | edit source ] This move effect may be in need of research. Reason: Did the fix first appear in Pokémon Stadium (Japanese) or the international Pokémon Stadium ? You can discuss this on the talk page. Recover restores up to 50% of the user's maximum HP , rounded down, and has 20 PP . In the Generation I core series only, Recover will fail if the difference between the user's maximum HP and current HP leaves a remainder of 255 when divided by 256 (such as 255 or 511). This was fixed in Pokémon Stadium and all future generations. Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] Recover's PP was reduced to 10. Generation V to VII [ edit | edit source ] Recover now restores 50% of the user's maximum HP, rounded up. If powered up by a Normalium Z into Z-Recover, all of the user's lowered stats are reset. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Status PP 10 Agile Strong Power — — — Accuracy —% —% —% Action speed modifier Self 0 -3 +5 Target ? ? ? Additional effect Heal 50% 30% 70% ? ? ? ? Heals the user by a percentage of its total HP Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Recover's PP was reduced to 5. Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Status Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power — Cooldown 15s Move wind-up time 25 frames Effect duration —s Additional effect — — — None

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Restores HP by 1/2 of the user's maximum HP. Few Pok é mon learn this technique on their own. Stad2 Half of the user's maximum HP is restored. Few Pok é mon learn this move on their own. G S C Restores HP by 1/2 the max HP. R S E Colo XD Recovers up to half the user's maximum HP. FR LG A self-healing move that restores HP by up to half of the user's maximum HP. D P Pt HG SS PBR A self-healing move. The user restores its own HP by up to half of its max HP. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP Restoring its own cells, the user restores its own HP by half of its max HP. LA The user regenerates its cells to restore its own HP. S V The user regenerates its cells, restoring its own HP by up to half its max HP. ZA The user restores its own HP through cellular regeneration.
